name: Ontario Electricity Support Program
description: Monthly on-bill credit applied directly to your electricity bill.

higherCreditEligible.description: Higher credits ($52–$113/month) available for electrically-heated homes, medical device users, or Indigenous households.

name: Low-income Energy Assistance Program
description: One-time emergency grant if you are behind on your electricity or natural gas bill.

benefits.note: Grant cannot exceed amount owed on bill.

applicationProcess: in-person or phone via intake agency

name: Energy Affordability Program
description: Free energy-efficient upgrades including smart thermostat, LED bulbs, fridge replacement, and more.

eligibility.note: Automatically eligible if you receive OESP or LEAP.

items: Draft proofing and insulation (electrically heated homes)

name: Enbridge Home Winterproofing Program
description: Free home energy assessment and weatherization upgrades for Enbridge Gas customers.

eligibility.note: Must be an Enbridge Gas customer and meet income criteria.

name: Northern Ontario Energy Credit
description: Annual tax credit for low-to-moderate income residents of Northern Ontario to offset higher energy costs.

eligibility.note: Apply via ON-BEN form on your annual tax return.

benefits.note: Amount adjusted annually for inflation. Applied as part of Ontario Trillium Benefit.

name: Home Renovation Savings Program
description: Rebates for home energy efficiency improvements including insulation, heat pumps, and smart thermostats.

eligibility.note: Available to all residential electricity and natural gas customers in Ontario.

benefits.note: Rebate amounts vary by upgrade type. Expanding in 2025 to include appliances.
